name: January 2025 results
message: In the first month of this year, our team managed to crack the ITdefenses of a large number of companies. Among them:hmkc.com.au | hersrudsofbellefourche.com | ptsmail.co.uk | simcointeriors.com | ptcalliance.com | infordata.net | cerved.comWe always act honestly and try not to disclose the fact of data leakage until the very last moment. Therefore, it is in your best interest to stay off this list and contact us immediately.
